'''''Recondite''''' was the personal [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Nial Declann]]. It was presumably with him at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] originally named the ''Recondite'' in a segment of his Grand Admirals article that was cut, and is therefore unofficial.

Recondite means hidden, and the ship was named to reflect Declann's moody nature.
